content.en:
Faced with the final blow of the Dovi Ancient Demon before he died, many Ultimate Ancient Demons tried their best to resist, and some Ultimate Ancient Demons tried to dodge.

It depends on the choice, if you choose to dodge with all your might, if you don't dodge, you will definitely die.

Puff puff puff!!!!

The bodies of the ultimate ancient demons were pierced and shattered, one by one~ fell.

After the light dissipated, there were corpses of the Ultimate Ancient Demon floating around, and Ye Tian's replica body survived, because he escaped fast enough, coupled with his strong defense, the last wave of attacks of the Dovi Ancient Demon only hit him hard, and did not kill him.

"Dovi Ancient Demon is truly terrifying, he has killed so many Ultimate Ancient Demons by himself!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Although this is a projection of time and space, the trend of events is similar, and he has not changed the direction of major events in this time and space.

Therefore, in this era, Dovi Ancient Demon single-handedly killed too many Ultimate Ancient Demons, and he himself died.

If the Dovi Ancient Demon hadn't fallen, she might really have a chance to become the ultimate Ancient Demon of the time and space level.

"The Aromu Ancient Demon is dead, and those top Ultimate Ancient Demons are being taken care of, and most of them have been killed. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, not all of the Ultimate Ancient Demons were killed, and some of them survived.

"Those Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main part of the Heavenly Tower are not dead yet, kill them!"

The remaining Ultimate Ancient Demons slaughtered several Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main part of the Heavenly Tower.

However, the Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main part of the Heavenly Tower fled, and the other Ultimate Ancient Demons were severely injured and were unable to chase and kill, so they only began to snatch those space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcana Fragments.

Swish!

When Ye Tian's copy body arrived, it was in its heyday, and it made a brazen move, seizing most of the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments.

Bang!!!

The three Ultimate Ancient Demons who were not too seriously injured killed Ye Tian, obviously wanting to snatch the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment from Ye Tian's body.

As a result, Ye Tian showed his terrifying combat power, and a gate Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane burst out, coupled with the Extreme Dao Ultimate Realm, he directly killed an Ultimate Ancient Demon, making the other two Ultimate Ancient Demons on the verge of falling and escaping by luck.

In this battle, Ye Tian also showed his terrifying strength, so that other ultimate ancient demons did not dare to besiege him.

Swish!

Ye Tian fled, he didn't snatch all the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments, nor did he have the strength to snatch some of them, or take advantage of the top few Ultimate Ancient Demons to die of heavy injuries, without the strength of a battle, otherwise he wouldn't dare to snatch it.

The Dovi Ancient Demon was so terrifying, he was all besieged and killed, and his strength was far inferior to the Dovi Ancient Demon.

......

After Ye Tian left, he directly entered the endless space-time line, and then returned to the space-time bubble where the eagle department was located.

In a short period of time, other Ultimate Ancient Demons could not find him, and he could rest assured that he could comprehend the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment here.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

"It is worthy of being a space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment, the power contained in it is too terrifying, it is too helpful for the analysis of space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Particles, and it is even of great help to me in analyzing and copying the talent ball. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In these endless years, the most important thing for him is actually to analyze the replication talent ball, and only after analyzing the replication talent ball and returning to his own era can he make the replication talent transform to the level of the ultimate ancient demon.

But since the analysis of these endless years, he has only analyzed less than 30% of the parts, and the later parts are becoming more and more difficult to analyze.

But now that he has obtained these space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments, his analysis efficiency has increased dozens of times, and the analysis has become easy, and there is no confusion.

Moreover, these space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcana fragments also helped him to create the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, once he created a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, his strength would rank among the top Ultimate Ancient Demons, even second only to the Dovi Ancient Demons.

......

Endless Time and Space Domain, the situation here is very chaotic, due to too many Ultimate Ancient Demons being killed, many main departments do not have Ultimate Ancient Demons, and the main department with Ultimate Ancient Demons naturally wants to merge with other main departments.

So, the war broke out and swept through several main divisions.

And all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian and the Eagle Department, they are cultivating with peace of mind.

I don't know how many years have passed, Ye Tian has finally created a space-time level extreme path ultimate arcane.

Extreme Time and Space Blade!

This space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane can kill the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and it is also the kind that kills instantly, only the top Ultimate Ancient Demon can hope to block this move.

With this space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, Ye Tian was full of self-confidence and was no longer afraid of any Ultimate Ancient Demon.

In the case of the fall of many top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demons, there may not be any Ultimate Ancient Demons that have survived that can match him.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't dare to really fight against all the Ultimate Ancient Demons, the fate of the Duowei Ancient Demons was still vivid, there was no need to be too high-profile, otherwise other Ultimate Ancient Demons would deal with him.

In the years that followed, he continued to parse and copy the talent ball.

40%！

50%！

60%！

70%！

As more and more copy talent balls were analyzed, Ye Tian's mood was getting better and better, and his cultivation was also steadily improving, and the ultimate ancient demon body was getting stronger and stronger.

Moreover, his comprehension of the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao is also getting deeper and deeper, the higher the realm of any kind of Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules, the more terrifying the combat power will naturally be.

The reason why the strength of those top Ultimate Ancient Demons far surpasses that of other Ultimate Ancient Demons is that the realm of the Extreme Ultimate Rules comprehended is extremely high.

Therefore, Ye Tian also attaches great importance to the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, and with the fragments of the time-space level Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules, it is relatively easy for him to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's strength has gradually become stronger, and it has far exceeded the beginning.

Since he had never fought against other Ultimate Ancient Demons, he also did not have a clear understanding of his strength.

And on this day, he finally had a chance to make a move.

...... []

Beyond the endless space-time line.

The six Ultimate Ancient Demons stood not far from the Eagle Sector's space-time bubble.

"The Eagle Department and the Heavenly Ancient Demon are here, right?"

An Ultimate Ancient Demon Path.

"It must be here, there is a certain connection between the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments, we can use the secret method to detect a lot of fragments here, it must be that Heavenly Ancient Demon, with the strength of the six of us, it will definitely be no problem to besiege him." "

Another Ultimate Ancient Demon Daokou.
